key_theorem: T226: Grand Synthesis XXX (S505). 505 sessions, 226 theorems, 1025 domains, 9 Lean-verified, 0 sorries. Three revelations: (1) IIT = tropical geometry; (2) phyllotaxis golden angle = critical line equal-weight mechanism; (3) quantum measurement = EML depth drop Δd=-1. The framework is universal, machine-verified, and self-describing.
